value.found_quote: The `--agents` flag accepts JSON with the same frontmatter fields as file-based subagents: `description`, `prompt`, `tools`, `disallowedTools`, `model`, `permissionMode`, `mcpServers`, `hooks`, `maxTurns`, `skills`, `initialPrompt`, `memory`, `effort`, `background`, `isolation`, and `color`.
value.rationale: The page lists `background` as one of the supported frontmatter fields for subagents, indicating a "background" configuration option exists for running subagents. While the page does not elaborate in detail on background as a non-blocking background task in this excerpt, the field is explicitly named as part of the subagent configuration. The page does not describe its lifecycle stage.
